description: Victoria-area $10/day ChildCareBC centres. Names are from the official BC list; overrides map FACILITY_ID to true for known matches in the BC registry data where names differ.
unmatched_notes: The following $10/day centres from the official BC list could not be matched to a facility in the BC Child Care Map Data. They may be registered under different licensed names or not yet in this dataset: University of Victoria Child Care Services (Complex A, B, Centre #1 & #2, Queenswood), Downtown YMCA-YWCA Child Care, Westhills YMCA-YWCA Child Care, Our Childrens Centre, Cari's Infant and Toddler Centre, Christian Life Children's Centre, Forest Circle Child Care, Aspen Grove Children's Centre, Fernwood Neighbourhood Childcare. Add their FACILITY_IDs to 'overrides' once identified.
